name: feas_500
description: Coupled stress fixture: 30 facilities x 12 periods, 500 SKUs (167 two-level BOM items with labor-coupled recipes over 3 firing periods, 333 direct SKUs), shared binding lane capacity 67/lane/period, shared labor 200/period. Scaled twin of feas_100 (same generator, factor 4.0). See feas_500_README.
